_comment: Tier-2 fixture for a known skfem pitfall: calling `ib.get_dofs('left')` without first tagging the boundary via `MeshQuad.with_boundaries({...})` raises ValueError. This is the canonical 'boundary lookup requires the mesh to have been tagged' pitfall that PR #20 promoted to a Table-1 entry on the skfem catalog. Validating Tier-2 against a backend in the .venv where the harness can actually compile-and-run.
